case_title: 709 GEARY STREET, LLC VS. SUNNIE HENG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-10-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SUNNIE HENG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
